title: hydrocotyle sibthorpioides var. calcicola
intro: Hydrocotyle sibthorpioides var. calcicola, also known as calcicole pennywort, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family that grows in well-drained areas, particularly on limestone outcrops. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing oxidative stress, improving skin health, and supporting liver function. Calcicole pennywort can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, or decoctions, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and other health problems.
